mapper.sql: id, draft_id, draft_version, reviewer, decision, comment, reviewed_at
mapper.insert: insert into content_review_record ( draft_id, draft_version, reviewer, decision, comment, reviewed_at ) values ( #{draftId}, #{draftVersion}, #{reviewer}, #{decision}, #{comment}, #{reviewedAt} )
mapper.select: select from content_review_record where draft_id = #{draftId} order by reviewed_at desc, id desc
select from content_review_record where draft_id = #{draftId} order by reviewed_at desc, id desc limit 1
